cli_command_specs.description: 输出 Truth/State projection summary，检查 execution/governance/observation truth 分离。
输出 queue snapshot、sandbox truth、queue correlation，并保留 queue_path_mismatch warning。
输出 memory projection、long-term candidates、asset candidates、risk signals。
输出 asset registry、binding、governance、memory candidate aggregate projection。
输出 prompt source projection、replacement risk、A7 candidates。
输出 RTCM runtime projection、session projection、context link warning、unknown taxonomy。
输出 Nightly Foundation Health Review summary。
输出 Feishu/Lark payload projection；send_allowed=false；no webhook call。
聚合全部 read-only diagnostics；不执行修复；不写 runtime；可写 report 到 migration_reports/foundation_audit。

api_endpoint_specs.description: 输出 Truth/State projection summary，检查 execution/governance/observation truth 分离。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 queue snapshot、sandbox truth、queue correlation，并保留 queue_path_mismatch warning。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 memory projection、long-term candidates、asset candidates、risk signals。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 asset registry、binding、governance、memory candidate aggregate projection。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 prompt source projection、replacement risk、A7 candidates。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 RTCM runtime projection、session projection、context link warning、unknown taxonomy。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 Nightly Foundation Health Review summary。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
输出 Feishu/Lark payload projection；send_allowed=false；no webhook call。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
聚合全部 read-only diagnostics；不执行修复；不写 runtime；可写 report 到 migration_reports/foundation_audit。 No action execution. No auto-fix.
